message:
fix(test): update 12 tests for PVC migration, async runAIDiagnosis, error propagation (#6921) (#6923)

- MultiClusterSummaryDrillDown: add useCachedPVCs to useCachedData mock
- useUniversalStats: add useCachedData mock (source switched from usePVCs to useCachedPVCs)
- storage: update error assertions (errors now propagated instead of swallowed)
- AlertsContext (both files): await async runAIDiagnosis calls
- AlertsContext __tests__: fix settledWithConcurrency mock to return PromiseSettledResult

Closes #6921

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
